project-oneliner: An AI that never sleeps — runs missions overnight in sandboxes and hands you reviewable artifacts (PRs, tools, posts, analyses) by morning.
project-description: Noctua is a proactive, multi-domain artifact factory. You queue a goal before bed; Noctua boots an isolated Docker sandbox, plans a step graph, fabricates any tools it needs, validates the work (tests must pass), and lands the result — a draft PR, a reusable tool, a social post, a clinical analysis — in a morning Review Queue. The hackathon MVP demos the overnight PR builder vertical end-to-end against a controlled demo repo, with stub tabs for the other producer kinds to convey the platform thesis. Code is just our first producer.
